name: FIND ALL
short_description: Immerse yourself in an exciting adventure in Find All. You will have to explore the unique scenery of the city of the early last century. Look for hidden objects and color this mysterious painted world.
detailed_description:
❤ COMING SOON ❤


About the Game

Immerse yourself in an exciting adventure in Find All. You will have to explore the unique scenery of the city of the early last century with its citizens in fashionable outfits of that time with a vintage car and a hot air balloon. All along the way you will have to find 100 hidden objects, so that the black-and-white world will be painted in color and come to life. You decide what items you want to find! Enjoy the game with atmospheric music. Suitable for the whole family

Game features:
-100 different items to look for

- Option to choose the item you want to search for

- There is a hint

- The world is populated by inhabitants, each one has a story to tell

- Coloring levels

- 2.5D effect

- Atmospheric music
- There is a crocodile
